executive_summary: Road network assessment covers 45.6 km across 156 segments. Condition: 68% good, 22% fair, 10% poor. Station Access Road peak traffic exceeds design capacity by 22%. Level Crossing LC-42 has vendor stall obstruction creating HIGH pedestrian safety risk. Railway Approach Road km 2.4-3.1 requires urgent resurfacing.
ai_findings: 156 road segments analyzed — 68% good, 22% fair, 10% poor condition
Station Access Road peak traffic: 520 vehicles/hour (capacity: 425) — 22% overload
Level Crossing LC-42 sight distance reduced 40% by vendor stalls
Railway Approach Road has 14 potholes exceeding 15cm depth
Perimeter Service Road encroached at 2 points (1,800 sq.m)

recommendations.action: Remove vendor stalls from LC-42. Restore 150m sight distance.
Resurface Approach Road km 2.4-3.1. Cost: ₹18 Lakh.
Commission traffic optimization study for Station Access Road.

infrastructure_warnings: Overpass at km 8.4 showing surface cracking — structural inspection needed
Street lighting non-functional at 6 of 24 intersections
Drainage grating missing at 3 locations on Station Access Road
